Dr Tim Clayton

Consultant Dermatologist

Trusted experienced consultant dermatologist Manchester with over 20 years experience

View Services

Book Appointment

Dr Tim Clayton

Consultant Dermatologist

Trusted experienced dermatologist with over 20 years experience based in Manchester.

View Services

Book Appointment

Why Choose Dr Clayton
as your Dermatologist?

Dr Tim is one of Manchester’s most experienced award winning dermatologists, having worked as an NHS consultant since 2007. He currently serves as President of the British Society for Paediatric and Adolescent Dermatology and is the clinical lead for paediatric dermatology at both the Royal Manchester Children’s Hospital and Salford Royal Hospital.
He has played a key role in training many of the dermatologists who now run private practices across the city. As a fully accredited adult and paediatric dermatologist on the GMC specialist register, he manages the full spectrum of skin conditions. Manchester born and raised, he has devoted his career to caring for patients in his home city.
Alongside his clinical work, Dr Tim continues to publish new research and contribute to leading dermatology textbooks. He is a regular contributor to television programmes across the BBC, ITV and Channel 4, and he has also developed an award-winning moisturiser for dry skin conditions.
New Consultant Colleague
Dermexpert is an established consultant-led dermatology practice founded and run by Dr Tim Clayton. The clinic has historically been single-handed.
As the practice continues to evolve, Tim is pleased to introduce a trusted consultant colleague who consults from Dermexpert on a limited basis when Dr Clayton is not personally consulting on site.

Dr Jennifer Sharif is a consultant dermatologist with expertise in adult and paediatric dermatology, including the assessment and management of female genital skin conditions. Dr Jen has worked closely alongside Dr Tim for over six years within the NHS at Salford Royal NHS Foundation Trust and Royal Manchester Children’s Hospital .

She shares the same high clinical standards, thoughtful approach, and commitment to patient-centred care that underpin Dermexpert.

Dr Sharif consults independently from Dermexpert one Monday per month between 1:30pm and 5:00pm. All consultations remain consultant-led, with medical responsibility held by the consulting clinician.

Award Winning

Award winning UK trained & trusted consultant dermatologist in Manchester

Experience

25 years experience in clinical dermatology.

Manchester & Wales Clinics

Tim has dermatology clinics in Manchester and North Wales.

National Recognition

The Times of London recognised Dr Tim to be one of the top 100 uk children’s doctors.

Read More

Book Appointment

Dr Clayton is an experienced UK qualified dermatologist from Manchester. He is dual trained in adult and paediatric dermatology. Here are just a few of the conditions and treatments that Dr Clayton provides in both his NHS and Private clinics.

Ovée Skin Health
A New Baby moisturising cream developed Dr Tim

Dr Tim is delighted to announce a brand new moisturising cream for babies and children with dry, sensitive skin. 
 
Over the years Tim has found that many of his patients and their carers look to purchase moisturisers over the Internet.
 
Generally he finds that they contain all the wrong things such as fragrances, preservatives and petrochemicals and the wrong sort of oils such as olive Oil and coconut oil which can be harsh particularly on the skin of babies with eczema. 
 
This new moisturiser formulated by Dr Tim Clayton contains only natural ingredients and is free from fragrance, paraffin and parabens. It was designed to nourish, protect and soothe children’s skin. It can also be used on adults with dry skin.

More Information

Purchase Now

Dr Claytons Testimonials

Overall Rating

5

     5/5

Mr Clayton was SO kind and reassuring. He explains things in terms that the patient can understand , appreciates the worries that the patient may have and reassures very well. He is an exceptional doctor who I would recommend unreservedly.

Written by a patient

“I highly recommend Dr Clayton, not only for being very efficient but for giving his time to answer any questions or queries I have had which I feel is important so you are reassured throughout.”

Written by a patient

My husband and I were so impressed with Dr Clayton. We needed to have our 11 month baby treated all of a sudden and Dr Clayton very professionally and efficiently dealt with everything. I would not hesitate to recommend his service to anyone, baby, child or adult.

Written by a carer

Private Dermatology Manchester

Experience is what matters when looking for an expert dermatologist.

About Dr Clayton

Dr Tim Clayton is a consultant dermatologist based in Manchester. He practices at Salford Royal NHS Foundation Trust and the Royal Manchester Children’s Hospital.

Book Appointment

Home » About Dr Clayton

DR TIM CLAYTON - LEADING DERMATOLIGST

Dr Tim Clayton MBChB MRCPCH FRCP(Edin) CCT Dermatology

 
Dr Tim Clayton is a highly experienced consultant dermatologist based in Manchester. He provides specialist care at Salford Royal NHS Foundation Trust and the Royal Manchester Children’s Hospital, and also offers private consultations at his Manchester clinic on 76 King Street and at Pall Mall Medical.
 
Fully trained in both adult and paediatric dermatology, Dr Clayton is listed on the General Medical Council (GMC) Specialist Register for Dermatology, reflecting his completion of extensive accredited training, including MRCP and a Certificate of Completion of Training (CCT) in Dermatology.
 
Choosing a dermatologist you can trust is essential. To support transparency in specialist credentials, the British Association of Dermatologists (BAD) has introduced the Consultant Dermatologist Tick. This mark confirms that a doctor is:
A member of the BAD

Listed on the GMC Specialist Register for Dermatology

Fully trained through the recognised UK consultant pathway

When you see the Consultant Dermatologist Tick displayed alongside a GMC number, you can be confident that your dermatologist has the expertise required to provide safe, effective care.
 
Dr Clayton specialises in diagnosing and managing conditions affecting the skin, hair, and nails in both adults and children. His practice covers the full spectrum of dermatology, and he is committed to offering clear, evidence-based guidance and treatment tailored to each patient’s needs.
 
Whether you’re seeking help with a chronic skin condition, a new concern, or a specialist opinion, Dr Clayton provides comprehensive and compassionate care backed by advanced training and many years of clinical experience.
 
He is fully trained in both adult and paediatric dermatology and is listed on the dermatology specialist register by the General Medical Council in London.
 
Dr Clayton specialises in the diagnosis and management of skin, hair and nail problems in adults and children. He is an expert on everything skin related.

Dr Clayton was named in the top 100 children’s doctors in the Times, one of only three dermatologists recognised in the UK.

about continued....

Tim is an official spokesperson for the British Skin Foundation and has been interviewed regularly on TV and radio.

Dr Clayton is a member of the Royal College of Paediatrics and Child Health and a fellow of the Royal College of Physicians (Edinburgh). He is also a member of the British Association of Dermatologists, the European Academy of Dermatologists, the British Society for Cutaneous Allergy and an executive board member of the British Society for Paediatric Dermatology.

He studied Medicine at Liverpool University and graduated with MB ChB in 1995. Whilst he was a medical student he undertook an elective study in dermatology working in a polyclinic in Bulgaria and another elective attachment in general surgery in Belo Horizonte, Brazil.

After graduation Tim undertook general medical training at Manchester Royal Infirmary and completed general professional training in Paediatrics at Alder Hey Children’s Hospital, Liverpool in 2000.

Dr Clayton worked in Napier, New Zealand as a pediatrician from 2000 to 2001.

On returning to the UK Tim completed Higher Professional Training in Dermatology at the Leeds Centre for dermatology. As a dermatology resident he was given advanced training in dermatological surgery. Leeds General Infirmary has a worldwide reputation as a centre of excellence for acne and rosacea.

After completion of specialist training in Dermatology, Tim undertook a clinical fellowship in paediatric dermatology , in Dublin (Our Lady’s Hospital for Sick Children) for which he was awarded a scholarship by the British Society for Paediatric Dermatology.

During that time he was involved in a number of studies looking at the genetics of Atopic Eczema, in particular the discovery of filaggrin as major gene involved in eczema.

Tim regularly reviews manuscripts for The British Journal of Dermatology and Clinical and Experimental Dermatology. He has published over 35 book chapters, original journal articles, case reports, correspondence and abstracts, mostly on therapeutics and paediatric dermatology.

Throughout his training, he regularly presented at national and international meetings including the British Association of Dermatologists and the American Academy of Dermatology. Tim hosts the national eczema society meetings in Manchester and is the principal investigator for 2 research projects looking at the genetic basis of atopic eczema and acne.

His special interests include; Atopic Eczema, Vascular Birthmarks, Skin Cancer, Paediatric and Adult Dermatological Surgery, Genetic skin disease, Laser Surgery, Acne and inflammatory skin disease. Dr Clayton is an honorary senior clinical lecturer at the University of Manchester.

Dr Clayton aims to provide a down to earth straight forward and honest opinion about his patient’s skin concerns. He can provide advice on skin problems whether they are medical or cosmetic in nature and he has experience and knowledge in everything skin related

Contact Information

Dr Tim Clayton is a consultant dermatologist based in Manchester. He practices at Salford Royal NHS Foundation Trust and the Royal Manchester Children’s Hospital.

Book Appointment

Home » Contact

Contact Details & Address

If you are a private patient of Dr Clayton’s please use the WhatsApp button on bottom of this page or email Mandy his private assistant. If you have health insurance you will need to book directly with Mandy as the online booking service can only book in non-insured patients.

If you are insured you will be asked to provide your POLICY NUMBER and PRE-AUTHORISATION Code before we can book the appointment.

Mandy will usually be in touch within 12 hours and can arrange to book an appointment in Dr Clayton’s dermatology clinics. Please note that she does not work at weekends or after 6pm.

Mandy is unable to assist with any NHS clinic enquiries. For any NHS query please call : 0161 206 1211.

All Tim’s clinics are understandably busy at the moment and we will do all we can to get you seen as soon as possible.

Where we are based
76 King Street, Manchester City Centre
Contact Dr Clayton
0161 817 5016
Send an Enquiry
Either click on the right hand side Whatsapp button to speak to Dr Tim Claytons personal assistant Mandy to assist your enquiry or feel free to email her direct on the following email: mandy@dermexpert.co.uk created

Dr Tim Clayton’s Manchester King Street Dermatology Clinic.
